questions.question: Why is scope creep called the most under-monitored failure mode?
questions.questionZh: 为什么范围蔓延（Scope Creep）被称为最缺乏监控的失效模式（Failure Mode）？
options: Each touch had a plausible reason in the moment; together they form a different change than was reviewed
It is too rare to monitor
optionsZh: 这会导致智能体（Agent）发生显式崩溃。
每次修改在当时看来都有合理的理由；但累积起来，却构成了与审查时不同的变更。
过于罕见，难以监控
测试会自动捕获该问题。
questions.explanation: Agents narrate each step in good faith; the silent total is the creep.
questions.explanationZh: 智能体（Agents）会如实叙述每一步；而沉默的总和正是悄然蔓延的偏差（creep）。

questions.question: Which contract field does the lesson call half the contract?
questions.questionZh: 课程中将哪个契约字段 (contract field) 称为“契约的一半 (half the contract)”？
optionsZh: goal
forbidden_files（排除范围）
task_id
approvals_required
questions.explanation: A contract without forbidden_files is incomplete; the negative space is half the contract.
questions.explanationZh: 缺少 forbidden_files 的契约是不完整的；负空间（negative space）同样构成了契约的一半。

questions.question: Why pin allowed/forbidden to globs rather than raw paths?
questions.questionZh: 为什么将允许/禁止的规则限定为通配符模式（glob patterns），而非原始路径（raw paths）？
options: Real repos move files; globs survive refactors between sessions
optionsZh: 通配符模式 (Glob) 速度更快。
实际代码仓库（Repository）中文件常发生移动；通配符模式（Glob）可在跨会话重构时保持有效。
通配符 (Glob) 加密效果更佳
原始路径（Raw paths）无法进行 JSON 序列化（JSON-serializable）。
questions.explanation: Globs (app/**/*.py) keep the contract valid through refactors.
questions.explanationZh: Glob 模式 (Globs) (app/**/*.py) 可在代码重构过程中保持契约 (Contract) 的有效性。

questions.question: What does the 'violation budget' pattern do?
questions.questionZh: “违规预算”（Violation Budget）模式的作用是什么？
options: Sets a monthly budget for the agent
Allows minor scope slips as warnings within a budget; only excess triggers a merge refusal — the difference between a gate that ships and one that gets disabled
optionsZh: 设置智能体 (Agent) 的月度预算
允许在预算 (budget) 范围内将轻微的范围偏移 (scope slip) 作为警告处理；仅当超出预算时才会触发合并拒绝 (merge refusal) —— 这正是能够顺利交付的门禁 (gate) 与最终被禁用的门禁之间的区别。
限制模型调用频率
每次违规收费
questions.explanation: agent-guardrails uses violationBudget so the gate is usable in day-to-day flow.
questions.explanationZh: agent-guardrails 使用 violationBudget，从而使该门控（gate）能够适用于日常工作流。

questions.question: What did the specsmaxxing practitioner report?
questions.questionZh: 硬件规格极限优化 (specsmaxxing) 实践者报告了什么？
options: Rabbit-hole rate dropped from 52% to 21% in three weeks without changing the agent; the contract did the work, not the model
optionsZh: 延迟 (Latency) 降低了 90%
在未更改智能体 (Agent) 的情况下，陷入死循环率 (Rabbit-hole rate) 在三周内从 52% 降至 21%；真正发挥作用的是契约 (Contract)，而非模型 (Model)。
成本上升了5倍
测试变慢
questions.explanation: Scope contracts in YAML before invoking the agent halved the rabbit-hole rate without model changes.
questions.explanationZh: 在调用智能体 (Agent) 前，于 YAML 中限定契约范围 (Scope contracts)，无需更改模型即可使陷入死胡同率 (rabbit-hole rate) 减半。

questions.question: What are the multi-contract merge semantics (least privilege)?
questions.questionZh: 多合约合并语义（multi-contract merge semantics）是什么（最小权限原则（least privilege））？
options: Intersect allowed_files; union forbidden_files; min time_budget; accumulate approvals; deny-all sticks; merge of None defers to the other side
optionsZh: 以最后合约 (Contract) 为准
对允许文件（allowed_files）取交集；对禁止文件（forbidden_files）取并集；对时间预算（time_budget）取最小值；累积审批（approvals）；拒绝所有（deny-all）策略具有粘性（即一旦拒绝则保持生效）；与 None 合并时，以另一方的值为准。
首个合同中标
随机打破平局 (Random tie-break)
questions.explanation: Least-privilege merge: intersection on allows, union on forbids, most-restrictive time, accumulate approvals.
questions.explanationZh: 最小权限合并（Least-privilege merge）：允许规则取交集，禁止规则取并集，时间限制采用最严格标准，审批要求累积叠加。

questions.question: Why do time and network budgets belong in the contract too?
questions.questionZh: 为什么时间与网络预算（Time and Network Budgets）也应纳入契约（Contract）中？
options: Wall clock and external-host access are scope dimensions; file globs alone are necessary but not sufficient
optionsZh: 挂钟时间 (Wall clock) 与外部主机访问 (External-host access) 属于作用域维度 (Scope dimensions)；仅依赖文件通配符 (File globs) 是必要但不充分的条件。
提供商需要它们
它们能减小 JSON 的体积
它们需遵循 Apache 2.0 许可证 (Apache License 2.0) 的规定。
questions.explanation: time_budget_minutes and network_egress allowlists are scope dimensions on top of file globs.
questions.explanationZh: time_budget_minutes 和 network_egress 允许列表（allowlists）是叠加在文件通配符模式（file globs）之上的作用域维度（scope dimensions）。
